subject: GT2 T48 Thermocouple Exceedance - Engineering Clarification
question: GT2 Unit 2 exhaust thermocouple T48 is reading 2.1 degrees F above baseline established during commissioning. Cross-verification with 3 adjacent thermocouples confirms the reading is consistent across multiple sensors not an instrument fault. GE remote monitoring team reviewing. Requesting GE guidance on acceptable operating range before next planned inspection interval at 48000 hours (est. June 2026) and whether immediate inspection is warranted. Current operating condition: 412MW full load continuous.

subject: Cooling Tower Basin Coating - Concrete Repair Scope
question: During prep work for CT-1 and CT-2 basin recoating project contractor identified concrete spalling on CT-2 basin east wall approximately 12 linear feet. Spalling appears to be from freeze-thaw cycle and was not visible during inspection 18 months prior. Requesting approval for expanded concrete repair scope prior to epoxy application. Estimated additional cost $85000 to $110000. Is structural assessment required before repair proceeds?

subject: TCEQ CEMS Recertification - Reporting Period Clarification
question: Following CEMS upgrade on HRSG-1 in May 2025 TCEQ requires quarterly performance specification testing. Q4 2025 testing was completed December 2025 but data submission deadline falls January 15 2026. Requesting TCEQ confirmation of proper reporting period designation for the first partial-year reporting cycle under the new monitoring system serial number. Annual compliance certification also due March 31 2026.

subject: GT1 Major Overhaul 2027 - Long Lead Parts Procurement
question: Planning team requires confirmation from GE on compressor rotor delivery schedule for GT1 2027 major overhaul. Current GE lead time estimate is 18-24 months which would require order placement by Q3 2025. Order was placed August 2025 per GE guidance. Requesting delivery confirmation and updated milestone schedule including factory witness testing dates.
